title: Natural Ocean Sponges | Soft,Yellow sea sponges for Newborn Babies Bath 0-8M | Facial Cleansing, for Arts & Craft Set - Size Small (6,5-8,5cm) – Pack of 4 pcs
features: SOFT & GENTLE for babies & children’s delicate skin. When wet , it is completely elastic and soft. Economy ocean sponge, Hypoallergenic and dermatologically tested.
FACIAL cleansing sea sponges, re-usable. for facial cleaning, removing cosmetics ,exfoliating and more.
ARTIST & CRAFT sponges set offer a range of creative possibilities. Each application with a sea sponge results in one-of-a-kind finish.
100% NATURAL & ORGANIC, sustainably harvested and handpicked from the warm waters of the Caribbean Sea.
Environmentally friendly, free of chemicals and toxins with natural antibacterial and anti-mould properties, in colour shade of yellow.

Due to the nature of this product, shape, size and colour variations are to be expected. Each sponge is unique due to the natural shape , no two sponges are alike. Measurements stated is the length of the longest size of the sponge.
description: Product Description Pasiphae Natural Sea Sponge for Baby's bathing Ideal for baby's & infant's sensitive skin 100% Natural & Organic - Incredibly soft - Suitable for all ages - Dermatologically tested - Hypoallergenic

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Safety information: This natural product is sustainably harvested from the sea. While we take great care to thoroughly clean and remove any sand or shell particles that may be trapped within the sponge's tubes, small fragments may occasionally remain. Before first use, please ensure the sponge is thoroughly rinsed and any such particles be washed away. Warning: For babies and toddlers bathing with a sea sponge always to be used with adult's supervision. Directions for Use: Before using, rinse the sponge with water to soften it. Apply your favorite soap or body wash to the sponge and create a rich lather. After bathing, rinse the sponge thoroughly under running water to remove soap and debris. Squeeze out excess water, being careful not to wring or tear the sponge. Allow it to air dry completely after use, avoid leaving it in a damp or enclosed space to prevent mold or mildew. Care and Maintenance: Occasionally disinfect your sea sponge by soaking it in a mixture of warm water and a tablespoon of baking soda for about 15 minutes. This will help maintain its freshness and prolong its lifespan.
